body.visualDesc: Over-the-shoulder shot from behind the pale-cream egg looking up at all three chicks. Pip gasps with surprised delight, pointing at the egg. Bo hops excitedly. Mo nods with a gentle smile. CRITICAL: the eggshell is CLOSED and intact except for exactly ONE thin hairline crack; a soft warm glow shines through that single crack only - the egg is NOT split, NOT open, NOT hatching yet. The golden straw nest frames the bottom of the shot. Afternoon light warms the porch.
